title: SENTINEL APEX Zero-Day Advisory: WING FTP SERVER
content:
Entity: WING FTP SERVER
Alert Type: KEV Rapid Addition
Exploitation Status: CONFIRMED
Confidence: 0.95

Recommended Actions:
